change_request: Implement Counties SEO structure: county data file, translation keys for countiesOverview and countyPage, contact-form defaultCounty prop, overview page, and county template page
acceptance_criteria: lib/counties.ts created with CountyData interface and 9 county entries
countiesOverview and countyPage keys added to en.ts and es.ts
ContactForm accepts defaultCounty prop and uses it as select defaultValue
app/[lang]/counties/page.tsx replaced with grid-based overview using COUNTIES data
app/[lang]/counties/[county]/page.tsx created with full 8-section county template

scope.change_request: Implement Counties SEO structure: county data file, translation keys for countiesOverview and countyPage, contact-form defaultCounty prop, overview page, and county template page

llm_analysis.assessment: The changes align well with the change request, implementing the county data structure, translation keys, and page templates.

risks: app/[lang]/counties/[county]/page.tsx:generateStaticParams - Incorrect parameter generation could lead to broken links.
components/layout/contact-form.tsx:ContactForm - Default county prop handling might affect form behavior.
lib/counties.ts:getCounty - Incorrect data retrieval could cause page rendering issues.

llm_analysis.notes: Error handling is present for invalid language and county slugs, but empty or null inputs are not explicitly handled.
No breaking changes detected; the changes are additive and do not affect existing APIs.

llm_analysis.recommendation: Add tests for new components and functions, especially for edge cases and regression risks.

overall.summary: The implementation aligns with the requirements but lacks test coverage, which is critical for ensuring stability and handling edge cases.
key_concerns: Potential regression risks not mitigated by tests
